title: Hieracium prilakenense
taxonomy: Hieracium prilakenense is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Hieracium, which includes a large number of hawkweed species. As a member of the Asteraceae family, it is also closely related to other dandelion and sunflower species. The exact classification of Hieracium prilakenense may vary depending on the source, but it is generally considered to be a part of the larger Asteraceae family. More specific classification details may be found in botanical databases or scientific research papers.
uses: Hieracium prilakenense is a plant species from the sunflower family, and while there is limited information available, it's primarily known as a rare species found in certain regions. benefits: Hieracium prilakenense, a lesser-known species of hawkweed, has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits.
